MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF CENTER FOR ENVIRONMENTAL HEALTH Motion for Court Approval and Entry of Consent Judgment as to Defendant VWR International LLC. Appearances: Lisa Burger, Esq. of Lexington Law Group (415) 759-4111 appearing for Plaintiff and Moving party. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Motion is granted, no opposition filed, and settlement complies with Health & Safety Code section 25249.7. Order & Judgment signed in open Court.(302/EHG) Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Court Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR #7489
